data.title: Scenario uses an unknown tag
data.query: Provision a component from its Confluence spec and produce the offline plan and scaffold.
expected_behavior: Resolves the provisioning config before drafting the component manifest.
Fetches the Confluence spec and maps each field type before writing the manifest.
Runs the offline plan and stops at the manifest and scaffold without pushing.
data.gap: Valid fixture seed for tag vocabulary enforcement.
